name: uli/buffer-api-client
description: A PHP client for the public Buffer GraphQL API that hides GraphQL from application code.

suggest.psr/http-client: Allow using a PSR-18 HTTP client instead of cURL.
suggest.psr/http-factory: Required by the optional PSR-18 transport.
suggest.psr/http-message: Required by the optional PSR-18 transport.
